name: Gould_identity_1_19
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_19 (n : ℕ) (hn : 3 ≤ n) :
 Nat.stirlingSecond n 3 = (3^n - 3 * 2^n + 3) / 6

name: Gould_identity_1_38
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_38 {x : ℝ}(n : ℕ) (h : x ≠ 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (n.choose (2*k) : ℝ) * x^(2*k) / (2*k + 1) =
  ((x + 1)^(n + 1) - (1 - x)^(n + 1)) / (2 * (n + 1) * x)

name: Gould_identity_3_69
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_69 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k : ℝ) ^ 2 =
  (1 / 2 : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (4 * n + 2) (2 * n + 1))

name: Gould_identity_4_21
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_4_21  {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((Nat.choose x k) / (Nat.choose (x + n - k) n) * ((x + n + 1 - 2 * k) / (x + n + 1 - k)) : ℝ) =
  1

name: Gould_identity_3_92
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_92  {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n - 2 * k) (n - k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * k) k) * (1 / (2 * k - 1 : ℝ)) = if n = 0 then (-1) else
  0

name: Gould_identity_3_181
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_181 {n x: ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (x + k) (k + 1)) * (Nat.choose x (n - k)) =
  Nat.choose x (n + 1)

name: Gould_identity_Z_40
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_Z_40 (n : ℕ) :
  (Ring.choose (-1 / 2 : ℝ) n) = (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (Nat.choose (2 * n) n) * 4^(-(n : ℝ))

name: Gould_identity_3_19
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_19 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose x k) =
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (x + k) n)

name: Gould_identity_3_116
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_116 {n : ℕ} (nezero : n > 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (4 * n) (2 * n - 2 * k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (k + n) n) =
  (2 / 3 : ℝ) * 4^n * (Nat.choose (3 * n) n)

name: Gould_identity_7_22
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_7_22 (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ) (h_x : abs x ≤ Real.pi / 2) :
  (∑' k : ℕ, (Ring.choose (- (n : ℝ) / 2) k) * (Ring.choose (n / 2 : ℝ) k) * (2 * Real.sin x)^(2 * k) / (Nat.choose (2 * k) k : ℝ)) =
  Real.cos (n * x)

name: Gould_identity_21_1
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_21_1 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (3 * n) k : ℝ)^3 * (Nat.choose (3 * n - k) n : ℝ)^3 =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (Nat.choose (2 * n) n : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (3 * n) (2 * n) : ℝ)^4

name: Gould_identity_7_12
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_7_12 (n : ℕ) (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (n + k) k) * 4^k / ((Nat.choose (2 * k) k : ℝ) * (n + k)) =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n / n

name: Gould_identity_Z_39
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_Z_39 (n : ℕ) :
  Real.sqrt Real.pi * (2 * n).factorial = 4 ^ n * n.factorial * Real.Gamma (n + 1 / 2)

name: Gould_identity_3_106
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_106 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * n) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n + 2 * k) (n + k)) * 2^(2 * n - k) =
  Nat.choose (2 * n) n

name: Gould_identity_3_90
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_90 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n - 2 * k) (n - k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * k) k) =
  4^n

name: Gould_identity_1_11
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_11 {x z: ℝ} (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (Ring.choose z k) * (x^(n - k) / (n - k)) =
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), (Ring.choose (z - k) (n - k)) * (((x + 1) ^ k - 1) / k)

name: Gould_identity_3_115
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_115 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (4 * n + 1) (2 * n - 2 * k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (k + n) n) =
  4^n * (Nat.choose (3 * n) n)

name: Gould_identity_1_93
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_93  {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) (2 * k + 1) : ℝ) = 2^(2 * n)

name: Gould_identity_6_50
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_50 (n a : ℕ) (h_a : a ≤ n) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc a n, (Nat.choose (k + a - 1) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n) (n - k)) * (Nat.choose k a) =
  (Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) n : ℝ) * (Nat.choose n a)

name: Gould_identity_3_168
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_168 {n x : ℕ} (hx : x ≥ n) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * k + 1) / (n + k + 1) * (Nat.choose (x - 1 - k) (n - k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (x + k) (n + k)) =
  (Nat.choose x n) ^ 2

name: Gould_identity_6_44
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_44 (n m x : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (m + n - k) (m - k)) * (Nat.choose x (m + n - k)) =
  (Nat.choose x m) * (Nat.choose x n)

name: Gould_identity_3_6
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_6 (n x y: ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (Nat.choose x k) * (Nat.choose x (2 * n - k)) =
  (1 / 2) * ((Nat.choose (2 * x) (2 * n)) + (Nat.choose x n) ^ 2)

name: Gould_identity_3_42
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_42 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose x k) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - x) (n - k)) =
   (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * n - k) (n - k)) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - x) k) * 2 ^ k

name: Gould_identity_7_5
Gould_identity_3_97
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_97 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (4 * n - 4 * k) (2 * n - 2 * k) : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (4 * k) (2 * k)) =
  2 ^ (2 * n - 1) * (Nat.choose (2 * n) n) + 2 ^ (4 * n - 1)

name: Gould_identity_12_8
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_12_8 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1),
    ((choose (2 * n) (n + k) : ℝ) ^ 2 * (4 * k + 1) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (4 * k)) /
    ((choose (2 * n + 2 * k) (n + k) : ℝ) ^ 2 * (2 * n + 2 * k + 1 : ℝ) ^ 2) =
  1 / (4 * n + 1 : ℝ)

name: Gould_identity_2_8
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_2_8' {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (2 * n), (-1 : ℝ)^(k - 1) * k / (Nat.choose (2 * n) k) =
  (n : ℝ) / (n + 1)

name: Gould_identity_3_55
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_55 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (n + 1) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - 2 * k + x) n) =
  Nat.choose (n - x + 1) n

name: Gould_identity_1_27
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_27 {x : ℝ}(n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (n.choose k : ℝ) * Real.sin (k * x) =
  2^n * Real.sin (n * x / 2) * (Real.cos (x / 2)) ^ n

name: Gould_identity_3_48
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_48 {n x r : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (x + k) (r + k)) =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (Nat.choose x (n + r))

name: Gould_identity_3_148
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_148 {n : ℕ} (d : ℕ) (h_d : d ≥ 2) :
  (Nat.choose (n * d) n : ℝ) =
  d * (d - 1) * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), ((d * k - 2).factorial : ℝ) / ((k - 1).factorial * (d * k - k).factorial) * (Nat.choose (n * d - k * d) (n - k))

name: Gould_identity_1_6
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_6 (x r n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * Nat.choose x k * (k : ℝ)^r =
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (r + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * Nat.choose x k * Nat.choose (n - x) (n - k) * n ! * stirlingSecond n k

name: Gould_identity_Z_59
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_Z_59 (x n : ℕ) :
  (Nat.choose (x + n) n : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * x + 2 * n) (x + n)) =
  (Nat.choose (x + 2 * n) n) * (Nat.choose (2 * x + 2 * n) x)

name: Gould_identity_6_26
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_26 (n r : ℕ) (h_n : n ≥ r) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * r) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - 2 * r) (n - k) : ℝ) ^ 2 =
  (-1 : ℝ)^r * (Nat.choose (2 * r) r : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - r) n : ℝ) ^ 2 / (Nat.choose (2 * n - r) r)

name: Gould_identity_1_132
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_132 {n m : ℕ} (hm : m ≥ 1) (h_n : n > m) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico m n, (Nat.choose (k - 1) (m - 1) : ℝ) / (n - k) =
  (Nat.choose (n - 1) (m - 1) : ℝ) * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico m n, (1 / k : ℝ)

name: Gould_identity_3_26
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_26 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * x) (2 * k) * Nat.choose (x - k) (n - k) : ℝ) =
  (x / (x + n) * (Nat.choose (x + n) (2 * n)) * 2^(2 * n) : ℝ)

name: Gould_identity_3_9
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_9 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose x (2 * k)) * (Nat.choose x (2 * n - 2 * k)) =
  (1 / 2) * (Nat.choose (2 * x) (2 * n)) + ((-1 : ℝ) ^ n / 2) * (Nat.choose x n)

name: Gould_identity_1_91
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_91 {n : ℕ} (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n) (2 * k) : ℝ)) = 2^(2 * n - 1)

name: Gould_identity_11_2
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_11_2 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) ^ 2 * (Nat.choose (4 * n + 2 * k + 1) (2 * k)) / ((2 * k + 1 : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n + k) k)) =
  (Nat.choose (4 * n + 1) (2 * n) : ℝ) / (2 * n + 1)

name: Gould_identity_7_4
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_7_4 {n x : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose x k) * (Nat.choose (x + 1) k) / (Nat.choose (2 * x) k) =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (Nat.choose (x - 1) n) * (Nat.choose x n) / (Nat.choose (2 * x) n)

name: Gould_identity_16_3
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_16_3 (n x y z : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose x k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose y k) * (Nat.choose z (n - k)) * (Nat.choose (x + y + z - k) (n - k)) / (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) =
  (Nat.choose (x + z) n : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (y + z) n)

name: Gould_identity_4_9
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_4_9 {n : ℕ} (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) / (Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) k) = 2

name: Gould_identity_2_19
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_2_19  (n : ℕ) (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (2 * n - 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k / ((k + 1 : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n) k)) =
  (2 * n + 1) * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), (1 / (k + n) ^ 2 : ℝ)

name: Gould_identity_3_163
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_163 (n m : ℕ) (hm : m ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (k / 2) m) =
  (n / m : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (n - m - 1) (m - 1)) * 2^(n - 2 * m)

name: Gould_identity_1_100
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_100 {n : ℕ} (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) (2 * k + 1) : ℝ) * k = (2 * n - 1) * 2^(2 * n - 2)

name: Gould_identity_1_107
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_107 :
  (∑' k : ℕ, (Nat.choose (2 * k) k : ℝ) / ((2 * k + 1) ^ 2 * 2^(2 * k))) =
  (Real.pi / 2) * Real.log 2

name: Jihuai_identity_120
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_120 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k * (n - k - 1)^(n - k - 1) * (k + 1)^k =
  - (n : ℝ)^n

name: Jihuai_identity_55
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_55 (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (n.choose k : ℝ) * Real.cos ((n - 2 * k) * x) =
  if Even n then
    2^(n - 1) * (Real.cos x)^n + (1 / 2) * (n.choose (n / 2) : ℝ)
  else
    2^(n - 1) * (Real.cos x)^n

name: Jihuai_identity_2_31
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_2_31 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), ((n - k).choose k : ℝ) * 2^k =
  (2^(n + 1) + (-1 : ℝ)^n) / 3

name: Jihuai_identity_56
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_56 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), ((-1 : ℝ)^(k + 1) / k) * n.choose k * harmonic k = ∑ i ∈ Ico 1 (n + 1), (1 / (i : ℝ)^2)

name: Jihuai_identity_134
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_134 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (∑ i ∈ range (k + 1), n.choose i) * (∑ i ∈ Ico (k + 1) (n + 1), n.choose i) =
  (n / 2 : ℝ) * (2 * n).choose n

name: Jihuai_identity_111
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_111 (n : ℕ) (x y : ℝ) (hx : x ≠ 0) (hy : y ≠ 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (n.choose k : ℝ) * (x + k)^(k - 1) * (y + n - k)^(n - k - 1) =
  (x⁻¹ + y⁻¹) * (x + y + n)^(n - 1)

name: Jihuai_identity_83
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_83 (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k * 2^k * (cos (x / 2))^k * sin (k * x / 2) =
  (-1)^n * sin (n * x)

name: Jihuai_identity_44
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_44 (n : ℕ) (z : ℝ) (hz : z ≠ 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (n / (n - k) : ℝ) * ((n - k).choose k) * z^(n - 2 * k) =
  (1 / 2^n) * ((z + (z^2 - 4)^(1/2 : ℝ))^n + (z - (z^2 - 4)^(1/2 : ℝ))^n)

name: Jihuai_identity_142
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_142 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (n + 1).choose k * (2 * n - 2 * k).choose n = n + 1

name: Jihuai_identity_2_39
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_2_39 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((2 * k).choose (n + k) : ℝ) =
  (1 / Real.sqrt 5) * (((1 + Real.sqrt 5) / 2)^(2 * n + 1) - ((1 - Real.sqrt 5) / 2)^(2 * n + 1))

name: Jihuai_identity_128
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_128 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) ^ 2 = Nat.choose (2 * n) n

name: Jihuai_identity_45
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_45 (n : ℕ) (h : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ x ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^x * (n / (n - x)) * ((n - x).choose x) * 2^(n - 2 * x) = 2

name: Jihuai_identity_52
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_52 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((-1 : ℝ)^k / (k + 1)) * n.choose k * (∑ l ∈ range (k + 1), (1 / (l + 1 : ℝ)) * harmonic (l + 1)) =
  1 / (n + 1)^3

name: Jihuai_identity_116
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_116 (n : ℕ) (x y : ℝ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (n.choose k : ℝ) * x * (x + k)^(k - 1) * (y - k)^(n - k) =
  (x + y)^n

name: Jihuai_example_1
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_1 (n m : ℕ) (h : m < n) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (n.choose k) = (-1)^m * ((n - 1).choose m)

name: Jihuai_example_3a
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_3a (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((n.choose k : ℝ) / (k + 1)) = (1 / (n + 1)) * (2^(n + 1) - 1)

name: Jihuai_example_3b
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_3b (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k) / (k + 1) = 1 / (n + 1)

name: Jihuai_example_9
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_9 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (2 : ℝ)^(2*n - 2*k) * ((2 * n - k + 1).choose k) = n + 1

name: Jihuai_E1_2
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_2 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), k * n.choose k = n * 2^(n - 1)

name: Gould_identity_1_16
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_16 {x : ℝ} (n j : ℕ) :  ∑ k ∈ range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (choose n k) * (k : ℝ)^(n + j) =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (factorial n) * (stirlingSecond (n + j) n)

name: Gould_identity_10_5
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_10_5 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (3 * n + 1) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (3 * n - k) n : ℝ)^3 =
  1

name: Gould_identity_1_81
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_81 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n - k) n : ℝ) * 2^k =
  2^(2 * n)

name: Gould_identity_1_83
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_83{n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k =
  2 ^ (2 * n)

name: Gould_identity_1_84
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_84{n : ℕ}  (hn : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) k =
  2 ^ (2 * n - 2) +  Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) n

name: Gould_identity_1_85
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_85{n : ℕ}  (hn : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Nat.choose (2 * n) k =
  2 ^ (2 * n - 1) +  Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) n

name: Gould_identity_1_88
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_88 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * n) (2 * k)) =
  (-1 : ℝ)^(n / 2) * 2^n * (1 + (-1 : ℝ) ^ n) / 2

name: Gould_identity_3_34
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_34 (n x : ℕ) (h_n : x ≥ n) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose x k) * (Nat.choose x (2 * n - k)) =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n * (Nat.choose x n)

name: Gould_identity_3_66
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_66 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) ^ 2 =
  Nat.choose (2 * n) n

name: Gould_identity_3_109
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_3_109 {n : ℕ} :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * k) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * n - k) n) * 2^(2 * n - 2 * k) =
  Nat.choose (4 * n + 1) (2 * n)

name: Gould_identity_6_11
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_11 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * n) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (2 * k) k) * (Nat.choose (4 * n - 2 * k) (2 * n - k)) =
  (Nat.choose (2 * n) n : ℝ) ^ 2

name: Gould_identity_6_36
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_36 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (Nat.choose (2 * n) k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose (n + k) k : ℝ) ^ 2 =
  Nat.choose (2 * n) n

name: Gould_identity_6_37
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_6_37 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n k : ℝ) ^ 2 * (Nat.choose (3 * n + k) (2 * n)) =
  (Nat.choose (3 * n) n : ℝ) ^ 2

name: Gould_identity_8_5
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_8_5 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ) ^ k * (choose (3 * n + 1) k : ℝ) * ((choose (3 * n - k) n) : ℝ) ^ 3 = 1

name: Gould_identity_Z_43
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_Z_43 (n : ℕ) :
  (Nat.choose ((2 * n + 1) / 2) (2 * n + 1) : ℝ) = (-1:ℝ) ^ n * ((choose (2 * n) n) : ℝ) * 2 ^ (-4 * n - 1)

name: Jihuai_identity_1_6
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_1_6 (n : ℕ) (h : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k = 0

name: Jihuai_example_2
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_2 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((2 * n).choose k : ℝ) = 2^(2 * n - 1) + (1 / 2) * ((2 * n).choose n)

name: Jihuai_example_7
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_example_7 (n m : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k) * (m / (m + k)) = 1 / ((m + n).choose n)

name: Jihuai_E1_1
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_1 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), 2^k * n.choose k = 3^n

name: Jihuai_E1_3
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_3 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (k + 1) * n.choose k = 2^(n - 1) * (n + 2)

name: Jihuai_E1_10
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_10 (n : ℕ) (nezero : n > 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * n - 1).choose k = 2^(2 * n - 2)

name: Jihuai_E1_11
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_11 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), k * (2 * n).choose k = n * 2^(2 * n - 1)

name: Jihuai_E1_16
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_16 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), k * (2 * n).choose (n - k) = n * (2 * n - 1).choose n

name: Jihuai_identity_123
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_123 (n m : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (m + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * n.choose k * k.choose m =
  (-1)^m * if m = n then 1 else 0

name: Jihuai_identity_146
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_146 (n : ℕ) (nezero : n > 0) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (2 * k).choose k * (4 * n - 2 * k).choose (2 * n - k) =
  2^(2 * n) * (2 * n).choose n

name: Gould_identity_7_18_zero
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_7_18_zero (j : ℕ) (h_denom : j ≠ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (1), (Nat.choose 0 k : ℝ) * (Nat.choose ((j - 1) * 0) ((j - 1) * k)) / (Nat.choose (j * 0) (j * k)) * (1 / (j * k - 1)) =
  -1

name: Gould_identity_1_86
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_86{n : ℕ}  (hn : n ≥ 1) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^ k * Nat.choose (2 * n) k =
  (-1 : ℝ) ^ n *  Nat.choose (2 * n - 1) n

name: Gould_identity_1_91_2
formal_statement:
theorem Gould_identity_1_91_2 {n : ℕ} (h_n : n ≥ 1) :
  (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n) (2 * k + 1) : ℝ)) = 2^(2 * n - 1)

name: Jihuai_E1_12
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_E1_12 (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), ((-1 : ℝ)^(k + 1) / k) * n.choose k * (1 - (1 - x)^k) =
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (n + 1), x^k / k

name: Jihuai_identity_2_32
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_2_32 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), ((n - k).choose k : ℝ) * 6^k =
  (3^(n + 1) + (-1 : ℝ)^n * 2^(n + 1)) / 5

name: Jihuai_identity_53
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_53 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n / 2 + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (n - k).choose k * 2^(n - 2 * k) = n + 1

name: Jihuai_identity_124
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_124 (n m : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico m (n + 1), (n.choose k : ℝ) * k.choose m = 2^(n - m) * n.choose m

name: Jihuai_identity_129
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_129 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (-1 : ℝ)^k * (n.choose k)^2 =
  if Even n then (-1: ℝ)^(n / 2) * n.choose (n / 2) else 0

name: Jihuai_identity_141
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_141 (n : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, ((2 * n).choose (2 * k + 1) : ℝ)^2 =
  (1 / 2) * ((4 * n).choose (2 * n) + (-1 : ℝ)^(n - 1) * (2 * n).choose n)

name: Jihuai_identity_131
formal_statement:
theorem Jihuai_identity_131 (n m q : ℕ) :
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (q + 1), n.choose k * m.choose (q - k) = (n + m).choose q
